class.name: CSVImporter
class.brief_description: High-level CSV importer with Variant conversion.
class.description: CSVImporter parses delimiter-separated text and converts fields to Variants such as Nil, bool, int, float, Color, vectors, arrays, and dictionaries when possible. Parser options can trim fields, skip empty or commented rows, change row-length handling, and customize null and boolean values.

method.name: import
method.description: Parses a file into typed row arrays. Supports [param options] keys [code]trim_fields[/code], [code]skip_empty_rows[/code], [code]comment_prefixes[/code], [code]row_length_mode[/code], [code]null_values[/code], [code]true_values[/code], and [code]false_values[/code].

method.name: import_string
method.description: Parses a string into typed row arrays. Supports [param options] keys [code]trim_fields[/code], [code]skip_empty_rows[/code], [code]comment_prefixes[/code], [code]row_length_mode[/code], [code]null_values[/code], [code]true_values[/code], and [code]false_values[/code].

method.name: import_string_with_headers
method.description: Parses a string into dictionaries using the first row as headers. Supports [param options] keys [code]trim_fields[/code], [code]skip_empty_rows[/code], [code]comment_prefixes[/code], [code]row_length_mode[/code], [code]null_values[/code], [code]true_values[/code], and [code]false_values[/code].

method.name: import_with_headers
method.description: Parses a file into dictionaries using the first row as headers. Supports [param options] keys [code]trim_fields[/code], [code]skip_empty_rows[/code], [code]comment_prefixes[/code], [code]row_length_mode[/code], [code]null_values[/code], [code]true_values[/code], and [code]false_values[/code].

method.name: parse_record
method.description: Converts one field string to a Variant when possible. [param options] may customize [code]null_values[/code], [code]true_values[/code], and [code]false_values[/code].
